Site: https://gillops.dpdns.org
Purpose: AI automation agency
Services:
- AI receptionists for dentists, law firms, salons, and local businesses
- Website development for healthcare, legal, real estate, and beauty industries
- Lead automation systems that qualify and follow up with prospects 24/7
- SEO systems for local business ranking
- AI chatbots trained on business data
- CRM integration and automation
- Google Maps lead scraping and outreach
- LinkedIn automation for B2B lead generation
